evidence.text: Pros of Working at Teleperformance: Learning Opportunities: Employees often mention the chance to learn new skills and grow professionally through training and hands-on experience. Supportive Environment: Many reviews highlight a friendly and inclusive workplace culture, with supportive colleagues and leadership. Remote Work Flexibility: Teleperformance offers a variety of remote roles, which employees appreciate fo...

evidence.role: Current employee - Operations Customer Expert I
evidence.text: Competitive Wages Work From Home Opportunities Good Work / Life Balance Great Supervisors and Managers Good Clients/Campaigns Shoutouts with Nectar rewards Great Company

Opportunities for both onsite and work from home roles With lots of different programs open different hours there are many different schedules recruiting can offer to find a good fit Good work life balance Leadership is open to and looks for ways to improve the employee experience Good Place to Work

Bonus for good performance as well as participation in challenges PTO Good work-life balance Free ice-creams Good management Continuous learning/training Opportunities for advancement/promotion to another role Open to feedback Food is provided on holidays and at other times It's a great place to work and grow.
*Work from Home *Innovation *Work life balance *Amazing Management Great Place To Work

As I reflect on reaching this 20-year milestone, I'm filed with gratitude. These two decades have been more than just a job - they've been a journey of growth, learning and shared purpose. When I started as part of the IT team, I never imagined how rewarding it would be to grow alongside this company. From planning and design to implementation and support, every phase has been an opportunity to contribute to somethi...

evidence.role: Current employee - Operations Customer Expert I
evidence.text: As an Operations Customer Expert I, I have been given a clear pathway for professional growth. I've been able to expand my skill set through various upskilling programs, which has directly led to me taking on more complex tasks. I also appreciate the mentorship from my supervisor, who has helped me identify my career ambitions and chart a path for future advancement within the company. Teleperformance has demonstrat...

evidence.role: Current employee - Pharmacy Service Representative remote
evidence.text: A great work environment where despite being work from hope , there is a sense of community and amazing support from the management team. Great Work Environment

evidence.role: Current employee - Turbotax Product Support Agent
evidence.text: Collaborative and friendly team environment Comprehensive training and ongoing support Opportunities to learn about tax software Ability to help customers resolve issues Supportive team and helpful resources

The people you work alongside are truly outstandingâfellow employees consistently demonstrate collaboration, dedication, and a strong team spirit. However, interactions with some members of upper management can at times be challenging, which can impact overall communication and workplace harmony. great people terrible benifits

Strong, supportive leadership team Leadership prioritizes employee well-being Leadership is committed to client success Leadership fosters a positive and ethical work environment Positive company culture Focus on employee growth and development Commitment to ethical business practices Strong client relationships Great Place to Work

Commitment to Employee Wellness and Fairness: Teleperformance places a strong emphasis on employee wellness and fair treatment. Leadership genuinely cares about creating a supportive environment, promoting emotional intelligence, and ensuring that team members feel valued. Opportunities for Development and Growth: Thereâs a significant investment in professional development, including leadership training and coach...

Supportive Management: I appreciate the supportive nature of some managers, which fosters a positive work environment. Flexible Scheduling: The company often provides flexible work schedules, accommodating various personal commitments. Diverse Environment: Working with colleagues from all over the world enriches the workplace culture. Timely Compensation: Company consistently pays on time, without unpaid overtime. E...
More than just a job - a fulfilling career with access to growth and development! Tremendous growth opportunity!
Company investment in personal & professional development, excellent leadership and support, endless opportunity for advancement! Amazing Career!

* work from home * flexible on schedules with make up time sometimes available * licensing is paid for by the company, as well as any classes that are required. * PTO * Can do full or part time Work From Home-Insurance
Many benefits, great work environment, good people. TP Review
Good pay. They work with you and try to accommodate with situations that may arise. Good pay
Free Ice cream, good training program, pay is decent with opportunities to bonus, Daily Pay Systems suck
some kind of help and floor support good pay good benefits and coworkers review
Love being able to resolve issues for cxâ¦.and explain our correct polices and procedures Member loyalty
They Gave me an opportunity The Recruiter are Kind and respectful

"I have been in the company for years and I am planning on remaining for a lot more. There are always opportunities for improvement, but I feel that I am being respected and assisted in advancing, and I have job security. For me this is very important. Job stability, continuous training, opportunities presented, diversity and respect to all. After COVID, I am thrilled to be working from home. This is one of the reas...
It is a good job for beginners. Salary

evidence.role: Current employee - Tier I IOS Advisor
evidence.text: Understandable, considerate, respectful, entertaining, fun Amazing

No work/life balance. They are good as long as you are killing yourself for them. As long as you are giving them 200%-no less, they are fine. This means, no family time, no time for your mental health. When life circumstances happen and you need to take time out for yourself, they abandon you and treat you like garbage. They will withhold your pay. My last day of work was October 1. I still have not received my fina...
No work life balance. Denied time off requests frequently Decent WFH job
Unreliable schedule, constant changing of schedules, "promotions" with no pay increase, micromanage, barely receive PTO, work life balance non existent. Worst place ever
Benefits are not the best but getting better. Great Place to Work

Felt Undervalued, At this job youâre only a number, if youâre an advisor or a supervisor, youâre consistently held accountable for things out of your control, they treat as only a statistic, your job is always at risk, I was apart of company for about 9 years, itâs a very stressful job, no work life balance, Supervisors always worked off the clock with no additional pay because of the unmanageable workload....
low salary low tech and processes Low salary

Low pay comparable to industry standards, coworkers who do poor work get rewarded and more flexibility while those who work hard and do great detailed work get ignored. Terrible benefits options. Low Pay
Would rather not say at this time Insurance Producer
A lot of work and sometimes it gets stressful Very stressful job
micromanagement, stressful environment low salary Okay
No advancement and clicks and low pay No advancement

evidence.role: Current employee - Bilingual Customer Service Representative
evidence.text: upper management no way to raised salary good at first but no growth opportunity
not able to adapt put you out the door very fast journey of opportunity

Revolving door, the benefits, dirty, broken cold too bright, an outrageous amount of security for nothing. Management does not listen, they do not invest money back into the company. Nothing gets better, just worse. The hallways smell the lunch rooms smell the bathrooms smell the work area smells. As cost of living increases the starting pay decreases been lied about increasing wages multiple times. Management
Management is not that great Okay

put me on spanish calls. fought extremely hard to get them off because it was difficult! never happened! still taking the calls! Wish schedules weren't so hard to change! system issues are a pain! Love it
- don't really have any cons (personal perspective) Lead/Sales Supervisor

Unprofessional management, inappropriate conversations, harassment was rampant, you do not matter, you are just a number/bottom in a seat, do not bother with this company if you have any type of disability, they do not care Terrible Experience
Difficult to work either developers who are afraid of us, afraid to share opinions, etc Tension from filled eorkplace

evidence.role: Current employee - Tier 2 Customer Service Representative
evidence.text: If you're not a people person, then this career isn't for you! The schedule varies. You can find yourself working late hours. Join the club! We are the greatest support group around!
Customers are always mad, little pay, unethical. Bad work vibes, toxic enviroment, awful. HORRIBLE
sexual harassment in the workplace makes it unsafe terrible
Constant stress and pressure from upper management. Call center chaos
low pay bad management horrible HR Abusive
No job security, inconsistent implementation of policy, inconsistent management, confusing expectations Negative Experience
